description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.1 Docker image. Add a job named pages that runs in the default stage, is limited to the master branch, and deploys to GitLab Pages. In the pages job run the shell commands: apt-get update -yqqq, apt-get install -y nodejs, bundle install --path vendor, and bundle exec middleman build. Cache the vendor directory, publish the public directory as a pages artifact, and ensure the job only triggers on the master branch.
